programme.title: Lost In Fiji

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep702: Paddling Quebec, Canada

programme.title: Hot Water Ep110: Aquabike World Championship Series

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path Ep102: Navigating the Nile - Luxor, Egypt
programme.desc: The three Eagar brothers go Beyond The Beaten Path as they attempt to navigate Egypt’s Nile River via a Felucca Boat…the ancient trading vessel of Egyptian transport and business. They travel north along the Nile, from the oasis town of Aswan to the ancient city of Luxor.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep212: Iceland
programme.desc: Join host Jon Olson as he rafts rapids with Arctic Adventures, takes us on a Reykjavik Downtown Walking Tour, catches a rare look inside a volcano, explores the world famous Blue Lagoon and enjoys the music of Jon Jonsson.

programme.title: Lost In Fiji

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Eversince
programme.desc: Can you remember the moment you knew you were hooked on snowboarding? 'Eversince' is a film about the first time, and chasing the unforgettable feeling every time after. Featuring: Lucas Debari, Jason Robinson, Keegan Valaika, Lizard King, Manuel Diaz, Bode Merrill, Nicolas Müller, Fredi Kalbermatten, Cale Zima, Brandon Cocard.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 1
programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 2
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 4
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 02
programme.desc: From the moment she strapped into a snowboard, Elena Hight has been an innovative and visionary force in women’s snowboarding. In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we take a look at two of Elena’s greatest achievements. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Scotty Lago and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 03
programme.desc: At age 16, during the 2006 Torino Olympics, Elena Hight was the youngest American to compete in Women’s Halfpipe. In 2010, at the Vancouver Olympics, she sowed the seeds of change to come. In Episode 3 of Elena’s Microdose series we explore more. Featuring Selema Masekela, Papa Mike and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 04
programme.desc: Failure in life can be our biggest teacher. In Episode 4 of her Microdose series, we learn how Elena Hight embraced failure on the global stage, embarked on transformative change, and unlocked her next level. Featuring Selema Masekela, Hana Beaman, Spencer O'Brien, Jamie Anderson, and Jeremy Jones.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 05
programme.desc: When Elena Hight made the surprising decision to set aside her Olympic routine to pursue backcountry riding, she astonished her peers and mentors. In Episode 5 of her Microdose series, we learn how and why Elena made the leap. Featuring Jeremy Jones, Hana Beaman, Todd Jones, and Jamie Anderson.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we will share with you some of the highlights of some of the best Women's Tournaments of 2019. We went to Florida to enjoy the US Open Women's Championship, across the Atlantic to England for the Staple International between England and Argentina, over to France where we stopped in Saint-Tropez for the Women's International and in Chantilly for the Women's French Open. Then back over to Argentina to enjoy the Pink Polo at Thai Polo Club.

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments
programme.desc: Words speak for themselves. An equestrian show unrivalled anywhere in the world, offering the highest level of performance. The CHIO Aachen is probably the most prestigious horse show in Europe when it comes to show jumping and dressage. Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 5 - Saint Tropez
programme.desc: We move on to sunny Saint Tropez to celebrate the fifth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2022. Who will win Saint Tropez's GP?

programme.title: Jumping International Le Saut Hermès - Highlights Prix du 24 Faubourg
programme.desc: After the famous Le Saut Hermès, the Prix du 24 Faubourg is also a competition with a classification of CSI5* but this time with point accumulation and against the clock. With obstacles from 1.50m to 1.60m, it is a big challenge with a progressive difficulty as rider and horse advance on the course. Relive the best moments of the Prix du 24 Faubourg in its 2019 edition.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Dirty Conscience
programme.desc: A cop thriller from Chile.Two young police recruits are assigned a tough, decorated Officer to train them. It quickly becomes clear that their new boss is involved with serious corruption. At first the two young cops try to look the other way. But as their boss begins to doubt their loyalty, the two recruits must choose between saving their honor and their careers--before their boss has them killed.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E05 - Naturally Enigmatic
programme.desc: Today we will visit three remarkable nooks of Europe in search of miracles of nature. To begin with, we will venture into Austria's Salzburg region. An area that is famous for its Alps and Tauern mountains but also because it is the birth place of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart. After that, we will move over to the south western outpost of the old continent, to Portugal's Algarve region. To conclude, we will admire Corsica, the French island of beauty.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E06 - Naturally Miraculous
programme.desc: In the rain forests of the Seychelles we encounter remarkable fauna and flora. Then on to Mauritius. Where the symbol of the cruel and inconsiderate colonization of Africa is the extinct Dodo bird. We conclude today’s episode in the very heart of Africa, in the only place on the planet where close relatives to humans, the mountain gorillas - live. The country is the Democratic Republic of Congo and the province we shall visit is South Kivu.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E07 - Legends of Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Stanton Arizona is famous for its gold mining history, including the legend of Charles Stanton's buried treasure, and Tom has a hunch!

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E08 - Rock Crusher
programme.desc: Tom and Kia bring a portable rock crusher to a hot spot in the Superstition Mountains of Arizona, hoping to crush quartz and rocks in search of gold.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E07 - Crossroads
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan Pt2. Corey makes a last ditch attempt to find an Ibex before a satellite phone call changes everything, he must now choose between his family and his best hunting buddy.

programme.title: 9 Lives
programme.desc: 9 LIVES portrays the fate of young people who decided at the age of 11, 12 or 13 to leave home and to live on the streets.

programme.title: Marseille

programme.title: Afternoon

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: GeneproDX is transforming traditional medicine —bridging Health Tech and AI and providing patients with fast, reliable, and accurate diagnostics. programme.title: Thirty the Series

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: After an ordeal, Felicity faces a difficult choice between an emotionally vulnerable family member and the career she’s worked so hard to build.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E05 - Episode 05
programme.desc: A new job opening at Legacy leaves Sanele and Petra excited. A former in-law wins the family over, except for Gordon and Angelique who remain sceptical of his sudden appearance in their lives.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E06 - Episode 06
programme.desc: Charlie’s fact-finding mission proves easy but he gets thrown a curveball. Petra and Sanele’s friendship suffers another blow as the big day rapidly gets closer.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E07 - Episode 07
programme.desc: A new Legacy employee makes an impression and seemingly has everyone eating out of the palm of his hands. James uses Felicity’s weaknesses to his advantage.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E08 - Episode 08
programme.desc: Stefan decides to take matters into his own hands. James sabotages Angelique and appears to have the Price family under his thumb.

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E20 - Episode 20
programme.desc: Stefan finds himself in deeper waters than he can handle, prompting Willem to make new allies.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E01 - Episode 01
programme.desc: Lexi’s night of fun turns to horror and difficult decisions have to be made. Just as the Potgieters family try to reconcile, they find themselves confronted with something new.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: A Marine rookie and his mentor vie for a nurse’s love, battling together in the air and on Nicaraguan battlefields.

programme.title: Long John Silver's Return to Treasure Island

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A group of medical students undertake some silly and frightening endeavors in order to pledge a fraternity

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An English nurse and an American soldier on the Italian front during World War I fall in love, but the horrors surrounding them test their romance to the limit

programme.title: DOA
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why

programme.title: Rescue Your Testimony
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick helps us deal with disappointment and revive our hope in “Rescue Your Testimony.” You’ll be encouraged to tell your story through the lens of God’s faithfulness.

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: God Knows, You Don't
programme.desc: Faith isn’t a destination. In “God Knows You Don’t,” Pastor Steven shows us that even though we don’t know what’s next, we can trust that God is guiding our steps.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 4
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: Something In Between
programme.desc: Jesus can meet you in between. In “Something In Between,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that we serve a Savior who is greater than the guilt, grief, or grave that can keep us separated from God.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Ricardo expresses his feelings for María Bonita in an attempt to pursue a serious relationship with her. programme.title: NOTICIERO UNICANAL
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en que la mujer presa es su mamá y la Madre Isabel le dice que Rosa Blanco, presa por asesinar a un hombre, no es su madre. El destino entrelaza a las familias en guerra. Buscan identidad de “El Doliente”

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel propone reunirse en una cena con Camila para decirle que va a sacar de la carcel a "su mamá". La Madre Isabel sólo quiere que Camila sea feliz y para eso le recomienda que forme una familia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila está feliz pués su madre, al fin, está libre, pero Max sigue dudando. Reunidas, quiere saber porqué la abandonó la mujer finge no recordar esos momentos dolorosos. La abandona por segunda vez. Es un golpe muy fuerte.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Regresa Sebastían como sacerdote y esto desilusiona a Amelia. Camila insiste en que Rosa Blanco puede ser su mamá, pero Max no quiere que se haga ilusiones para que no sufra.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max busca noticias sobre Rosa Blanco; la Madre Isabel le confiesa al Padre Tiziano que ya Camila conoce el nombre de su mamá. Camila descubre a Max en un beso con Astrid. Familias en guerra.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas.

programme.title: Fantasías
programme.desc: La historia de Brenda y Antonio, una pareja de clase media con dos hijos adolescentes y una vida sexual aburrida, en busca de nuevas experiencias, primero con su sexy sirvienta. Más tarde, siguiendo el consejo de Esther, una amiga mayor que tiene un estilo de vida swinger junto con su esposo, deciden explorar la posibilidad de despertar una nueva pasión al ligar con Miguel y Claudia, una pareja swinger. Pero luego llegan los problemas.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
